MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark E. Rennie, Esq. (415) 981-4500, for Defendant and Moving Party Salinas
Michael W. Braa, Esq., Michael W. Braa & Associates (559) 244-0324 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Jakob
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT MAURICE SALINAS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT: GRANTED. The Court also orders Defendant pay to Plaintiff the sum of $2,000.00 for attorney fees and costs. The Defendant shall file its answer and pay the assessed $2,000.00 attorney fees within 10 days. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Nov-17-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Leticia Perez.
Appearances:
Michael W. Braa, Sr., Esq. for Plaintiff Charles Q. Jakob, also present, was sworn & examined.
Exhibit 1 - Newspaper advertisement, SF Weekly, dated Feb. 6-12, 2002...ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Maurice Salinas dba Club Caliente, in the amount of $4,000.00 for each of the three violations of the Unruh Act and injunctive relief for gender bias promotion.
Damages of $12,000.00
Attorney's fees of $3,750.00
Costs of $333.00
For the total of $16,083.00.
Does 1-10 are dismissed.

Counsel to prepare judgment which includes injunctive relief language.
